title: Sanity And Insanity
body: Description - Sanity and Insanity is a mod that implements sanity into the game, as in, doing certian actions in-game lower and higher your sanity bar. Eating a spider eye? SANITY LOWERED! Eating a golden apple? SANITY RESTORED! What changes Sanity? Fixing sanity: - A Good environment - Healthy Food - Stay Healthy - Fishing is soul food - Socialize - Get a pet dog - Rest - Advancements Ruining sanity: - A harsh environment - Horrible food - Low hunger - LIGHTNING! - Harmful things - Trample farmland - Unrest Sanity Bar - This image above your health and hunger bar is your sanity, keep it at the best levels possible! Effects Of Insanity - If your sanity goes low enough you will get "Insanity" a new effect, you will slowly die while seeing visions, you are also blind. Sanity Commands - You can use the command "/sanity" to check or set the sanity of target players Keybinds - Press "G" to reposition the sanity bar. Press "U" to toggle the sanity bar visibility. Extra - Post imbedded links for showcase videos in the comments. NEVER EVER republish my mod on another website without my permission! Feel free to use in your mod-packs, credit would be appreciated but it is not necessary. I'm not making any fabric versions of this mod so don't ask. Report any and all issues exclusively in the issues tab on my Curseforge page. Link to Curseforge: https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sanity-and-insanity
